hooks.command: if git status --porcelain | grep -qE '\.tsx?$' && ! find /tmp/photosphere-compile-last-run -mmin -1 -type f 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then bun run compile; fi
if git status --porcelain | grep -qE '\.tsx?$' && ! find /tmp/photosphere-test-unit-last-run -mmin -1 -type f 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then bun run test; fi
if git status --porcelain | grep -qE '\.tsx?$' && ! find /tmp/photosphere-test-cli-last-run -mmin -5 -type f 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then bun run test:cli; fi
